scripts.test:component: cd apps/renderer && pnpm exec playwright test --config=playwright.component.config.ts
scripts.test:integration: cd apps/renderer && pnpm exec playwright test --config=playwright.integration.config.ts
scripts.test:visual: cd apps/renderer && pnpm exec playwright test --config=playwright.visual.config.ts
scripts.test:visual:update: cd apps/renderer && pnpm exec playwright test --config=playwright.visual.config.ts --update-snapshots
scripts.test:e2e: cd apps/shell && pnpm exec playwright test --config=playwright.e2e.config.ts
scripts.test:e2e:debug: cd apps/shell && PWDEBUG=1 pnpm exec playwright test --config=playwright.e2e.config.ts
scripts.test:all: pnpm test && pnpm test:component && pnpm test:integration && pnpm test:sidecar-integration && pnpm test:e2e && pnpm test:visual
